response.reasoning: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience, well above the 6+ requirement. Strong TypeScript/Node.js background at Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and current re:cinq role. React experience present (Optilyz). MongoDB and SQL covered. Docker/Kubernetes mentioned (GISCollective deployment). Git proficiency clear. Testing emphasis is a strong match (TDD advocate, created testing libraries like Fluent-Asserts and Trial, taught TDD courses). AI agent experience mentioned at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) — directly relevant. Java experience from Altom (robotic arms, mobile orchestration). Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned but transferable from Node.js/Jest ecosystem. Kotlin not mentioned. Bachelor's in CS satisfies education. Strong community/teaching presence indicates good communication. No explicit cloud platform depth beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz. Overall a very strong match.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack with TypeScript/Node.js/React across multiple senior roles
Hands-on AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience at current role
Deep testing/TDD expertise — built test frameworks, taught TDD courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is from 2014-2018
Cloud breadth limited (AWS CDK only; no GCP/Azure mentioned)
response.justification: Candidate exceeds the experience bar with a strong fullstack TypeScript/Node.js/React track record, directly relevant AI agent work at re:cinq, and exceptional testing credentials. Gaps in Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin are minor for a senior engineer with this breadth and would close quickly on the job.
